response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong software development skills, particularly in full-stack and event-driven architectures, with exposure to multiple languages and frameworks. However, his experience lacks depth in C++ for industrial automation, secure development lifecycle (SDL), and industrial cybersecurity standards like IEC 62443, which are critical for this role. His background in web, mobile, and AI-agent infrastructure may not fully align with the core requirements of high-performance C++ development for automation machinery.
strengths: Diverse experience with event-driven architectures and message brokers, relevant to modular and scalable systems.
Strong background in testable, high-performance applications (e.g., low-latency apps in DLang, Node.js).
Proven ability to mentor teams and contribute to technical documentation, aligning with behavioral competencies.
concerns: Limited recent hands-on experience with C++ (last noted in 2015), a core requirement for this role.
No explicit mention of secure coding practices, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443).
Primary expertise lies in web/mobile development (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than embedded/industrial automation systems.
